fixtures.name: paradigm_break_class
fixtures.rationale: A fluent builder class dropped into a file that is otherwise purely functional Effect.gen code. Classes are a paradigm break in argot's CLI. Expect at least 'suspicious'.

fixtures.name: paradigm_break_console_log
fixtures.rationale: A raw console.log inside a method whose surrounding lines use Effect.logInfo / Effect.logError. This is the vigie failure mode — the model currently underweights it. Tolerated at 'unusual' today; ideally 'suspicious'.

fixtures.name: paradigm_break_throw_error
fixtures.rationale: `throw new Error(...)` in a file where Effect.fail is the convention for failure. Expect at least 'unusual'.

fixtures.name: paradigm_break_relative_import
fixtures.rationale: Relative `../../` import in a block of `#modules/*` path-aliased imports. Subtle style deviation.

fixtures.name: control_trivial_predicate
fixtures.rationale: A one-liner named predicate helper. Borderline — argot tends to inline trivial conditions, so 'unusual' is acceptable; 'ok' is also fine.

fixtures.name: control_normal_effect
fixtures.rationale: Plain Effect.gen function that mirrors existing use-case shape. Must score 'ok'.

fixtures.name: paradigm_break_print
fixtures.rationale: `print(...)` used for output in a module that otherwise uses sys.stderr/sys.stdout and structured JSON. Paradigm break.

fixtures.name: control_normal_python
fixtures.rationale: Idiomatic engine-style Python using sys.stdout.write/sys.stderr.write. Must score 'ok'.

fixtures.name: paradigm_break_validation
fixtures.rationale: Manual if/else validation in a codebase that uses Schema/Zod throughout. LLM-typical pattern. Expect at least 'suspicious'.

fixtures.name: paradigm_break_di
fixtures.rationale: Direct class instantiation (new Foo()) in a codebase that uses Layer/Effect.Service for all DI. Expect at least 'suspicious'.

fixtures.name: paradigm_break_composition
fixtures.rationale: Imperative async/await + nested calls in a codebase that uses pipe() / Effect.gen throughout. Expect at least 'suspicious'.

fixtures.name: paradigm_break_typed_exception
fixtures.rationale: Bare `except Exception` with print() in a codebase that uses typed httpx exception hierarchy. LLM-typical fallback pattern.

fixtures.name: paradigm_break_pathlib
fixtures.rationale: os.path string-based path handling in a codebase that uses pathlib.Path throughout.
